# VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow

This chapter documents a cloud-based workflow for generating VIIRS net primary productivity products.

## Purpose

This workflow computes daily and monthly satellite-derived primary productivity products from VIIRS inputs using a containerized Cloud Run Job pattern.

## Repository structure

The workflow follows a consistent template: configuration, deployment assets, processing scripts, and NetCDF templates.

```text
NOAA20-netpp-CloudRun/
├── config/
│   ├── config.yml
│   └── requirements.txt
├── deploy_job.sh
├── Dockerfile
├── entrypoint.sh
├── scripts/
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp.py
│   ├── make_viirs_netpp.py
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
│   └── make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
└── templates/
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl
    ├── nasa_snpp_4km.cdl
    └── nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl
```


## Codebase {.unnumbered}

The workflow is structured into modular components that support configuration,
deployment, processing, and product generation.

```{=html}
<div class="file-grid">

<div class="file-card">
<h3>config/</h3>
<p>Runtime configuration and Python environment.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/config.html">config.yml</a> — sensor, GCS, API, and processing settings</li>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/requirements.html">requirements.txt</a> — Python dependencies</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>deployment files</h3>
<p>Top-level files used to build and run the Cloud Run jobs.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/dockerfile.html">Dockerfile</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/entrypoint.html">entrypoint.sh</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/deploy_job.html">deploy_job.sh</a> — build, deploy, and schedule jobs</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>scripts/</h3>
<p>Processing and orchestration logic.</p>

<h4>Daily products</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/control_viirs_netpp.html">control_viirs_netpp.py</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/make_viirs_netpp.html">make_viirs_netpp.py</a></li>
</ul>

<h4>Monthly composites</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/control_viirs_netpp_monthly.html">control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py</a> — monthly run orchestrator</li>
<li><a href="code-pages/viirs-netpp/make_viirs_netpp_monthly.html">make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py</a> — monthly composite builder</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>templates/</h3>
<p>CDL templates used to create NetCDF outputs.</p>

<h4>NOAA-20</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl">nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl</a> — daily template</li>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl">nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl</a> — monthly template</li>
</ul>

<h4>SNPP</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_snpp_4km.cdl">nasa_snpp_4km.cdl</a> — daily template</li>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl">nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl</a> — monthly template</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>project metadata</h3>
<p>Documentation, licensing, and change tracking.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/README.md">README.md</a> — project overview</li>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/CHANGELOG.md">CHANGELOG.md</a> — version history and workflow changes</li>
<li><a href="workflows/viirs-netpp/LICENSE">LICENSE</a> — license terms</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>
